english_text: A. Faith vs. Disbelief (1 - 20 verses). B. Allah's creation and knowledge (21 - 39). C. Deliverance of Shariah to Bani Israel (40 - 103). D. Details of how Ibrahim (AS) was tested (104 - 141). E. Ka'ba is the new qibla (142 - 152). F. Details of how Muslims will be tested (153 - 177). G. Deliverance of Shariah to Muslims (178 - 253). H. Allah's creation and knowledge (254 - 284). I. Faith vs. Disbelief (285 - 286).
alt_text: Nine-point A-I list of Surah al-Baqara's thematic sections with verse ranges, center pivot 'E' highlighted in red.
notes: Content-duplicate of binder 34 ch153 img 005 (Surah al-Baqara chiastic outline).
